title: Examples for API usage
excerpt: Anyone know of any good examples for API usage. I’ve gone through the docs, they aren’t great. Also, the tutorial examples are terrible and not very usable inmo. Specifically, Python is preferable however, any examples m…

posts.author: meandI (darryl lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Anyone know of any good examples for API usage. I’ve gone through the docs, they aren’t great. Also, the tutorial examples are terrible and not very usable inmo. Specifically, Python is preferable however, any examples may give me some insight.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @meandI - welcome to the community. I’m sorry to hear the tutorials are not helping here, I’d be happy to help wherever I can.

The API is a GraphQL API which can be used as a standalone, or called through languages such as Python. We have a Python quickstart guide you can refer to if you have not done so already.

If you let me know any specific questions, I’d be happy to help.

-Daniel

posts.author: meandI (darryl lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the reply, yes thank you. I have taken a look, I have posted a question to the community here with a specific question.
